title: Sales Forecasting Model
summary: Time-series forecasting using Prophet and custom seasonality components.
description: A full pipeline for forecasting retail sales across 50 stores. Built with Facebook Prophet, with custom regressors for promotional events and holiday effects. Deployed as an interactive dashboard.

title: Customer Segmentation
summary: K-means and UMAP-based clustering to identify distinct customer personas.
description: Unsupervised clustering pipeline using K-means with UMAP dimensionality reduction for visualisation. Identified 6 distinct customer segments used to personalise marketing campaigns.

title: NLP Sentiment Analysis
summary: Fine-tuned BERT model for sentiment analysis on product reviews.
description: Fine-tuned a DistilBERT model on 100k product reviews. Achieved 93% accuracy on a held-out test set. Includes an interactive demo where you can enter your own text.
